flag.offshoreWindHint: The wind pushes from the shore toward open water — do not drift away from the shore.

stale.label: Stale data
stale.hint: The reading is more than 30 minutes old — not current.

storm.level2: Level 2 storm warning — staying on the water is forbidden, return to shore immediately.
storm.level1: Level 1 storm warning in effect — the index is capped at {{index}}, proceed with caution only.

reason.offshore: Offshore wind {{wind}} km/h — elevated danger, stay close to the shore.
reason.strongWind: Strong wind ({{wind}} km/h) — conditions are dangerous.
reason.cold: Cold water ({{temp}} °C) — wetsuit recommended, higher risk of hypothermia.
reason.moderateWind: Moderate wind ({{wind}} km/h) — paddle with caution.
reason.good: Pleasant conditions ({{wind}} km/h wind) — excellent for paddling.
